---
name: Bug report
about: Something in a skill is wrong, outdated, or doesn't trigger as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Which skill?**
Folder path, e.g. `skills/dev/backend-developer`.

**What's wrong?**
A clear description of the issue — incorrect content, contradictory guidance, a
description that fails to trigger the skill when it should (or triggers when it
shouldn't), broken generated Markdown, etc.

**Expected behavior**
What you expected instead.

**Additional context**
Prompt(s) used, Claude surface (Claude Code / claude.ai / API), anything else relevant.
